name: NS1_AddOns
rows: Single-tenant redundant layer. Size PoP by records+queries; choose # PoPs (min 3, max 12).
Priced on China-origin MQ; minimum 50M queries; requires Managed DNS; records/filters/monitors same limits.
Flat % of total queries: 20% list, discountable to 10%. Optional custom data-collection policy add-on.
Cannot be sold standalone — requires Managed DNS (enter Managed DNS data first). RUM queries sold in 5M-query (5-interaction) packs; NS1 RUM data or client's own.
Per filter chain; RUM-based (GSLB) filters cost extra.
20-30% (usually enough to win; NS1 buyers weigh functionality over price).
